features.description: Determines the ambient lighting phase which affects object visibility and sensor performance.
features.extraction_query: Analyze the sky and shadow intensity to identify the 'Time_of_Day'. Options: 'Daylight', 'Night', 'Twilight', 'Dawn/Dusk'.

features.description: The current atmospheric state impacting road friction and visual range.
features.extraction_query: Identify the 'Weather_Condition' by looking at the sky, road surface reflections, and precipitation. Options: 'Clear', 'Cloudy', 'Rainy', 'Snowy', 'Foggy'.

features.description: The general classification of the surrounding area which dictates expected traffic patterns.
features.extraction_query: Identify the 'Road_Environment_Type' based on buildings, infrastructure, and road design. Options: 'Urban', 'Highway', 'Rural', 'Residential', 'Tunnel'.

features.description: The physical state of the road surface, crucial for calculating braking distance.
features.extraction_query: Determine the 'Road_Surface_Condition' by analyzing surface texture and reflections. Options: 'Dry', 'Wet', 'Snow_Covered', 'Icy', 'Slushy'.

features.description: Qualitative measure of the volume of other vehicles in the ego-vehicle's vicinity.
features.extraction_query: Estimate the 'Traffic_Density' based on the count and proximity of surrounding vehicles. Options: 'Empty', 'Low', 'Moderate', 'High/Congested'.

features.description: Indicates if vulnerable road users (pedestrians) are visible in the scene.
features.extraction_query: Detect 'Pedestrian_Presence' and their location relative to the road. Options: 'None', 'On_Sidewalk', 'Crossing_Road', 'Near_Roadside'.

features.description: Presence of cyclists or micromobility users which require higher lateral safety margins.
features.extraction_query: Identify the presence of 'Cyclist_Presence' in the frame. Options: 'Yes', 'No'.

features.description: The count of distinct travel lanes available on the current road segment.
features.extraction_query: Count the 'Number_of_Visible_Lanes' demarcated by lane markings. Options: '1', '2', '3', '4', '5+'.

features.description: The geometric configuration of road junctions appearing in the frame.
features.extraction_query: Identify the 'Intersection_Type' ahead or currently being navigated. Options: 'None', 'T-Junction', 'Four-Way', 'Roundabout', 'Y-Junction'.

features.description: The clarity and state of lane lines, affecting lane-keeping systems.
features.extraction_query: Assess the 'Lane_Marking_Visibility' on the road surface. Options: 'Clear', 'Faded', 'Occluded_by_Snow/Water', 'Absent'.

features.description: Identifies the primary non-natural light source in low-light conditions.
features.extraction_query: Identify the primary 'Artificial_Lighting_Source' in the scene. Options: 'None', 'Street_Lights', 'Vehicle_Headlights', 'Tunnel_Lights', 'Building_Lights'.

features.description: Presence of designated pedestrian crossing zones marked on the road.
features.extraction_query: Determine the 'Crosswalk_Presence' within the field of view. Options: 'Yes', 'No'.

features.description: The inclination of the road, affecting vehicle dynamics and line-of-sight.
features.extraction_query: Identify the 'Vertical_Road_Profile' based on the horizon line and road vanishing point. Options: 'Flat', 'Uphill', 'Downhill', 'Crest'.

features.description: The lateral bend of the road ahead.
features.extraction_query: Analyze the road geometry to determine 'Horizontal_Road_Curvature'. Options: 'Straight', 'Slight_Left', 'Sharp_Left', 'Slight_Right', 'Sharp_Right'.

features.description: Presence of physical dividers or safety barriers like guardrails or medians.
features.extraction_query: Identify any 'Infrastructure_Barriers' present alongside or between lanes. Options: 'None', 'Concrete_Median', 'Metal_Guardrail', 'Noise_Wall', 'Curb'.

features.description: The prevalence of man-made structures in the scene, used for localization context.
features.extraction_query: Evaluate the 'Building_Density' in the background and periphery. Options: 'High_Rise', 'Low_Density_Urban', 'Industrial', 'Sparse/Rural', 'None'.

features.description: The amount of natural greenery, which can cause occlusions or lighting variations.
features.extraction_query: Determine the 'Vegetation_Level' visible in the surroundings. Options: 'None', 'Sparse', 'Moderate', 'Dense_Forest', 'Park-like'.

features.description: Indicates if regulatory, warning, or informative signs are visible.
features.extraction_query: Identify the 'Traffic_Sign_Presence' and the general category of signs visible. Options: 'None', 'Regulatory', 'Warning', 'Directional', 'Multiple_Types'.

features.description: The dominant types of vehicles appearing in the frame.
features.extraction_query: Categorize the 'Vehicle_Composition' based on the types of vehicles present (buses, trucks, cars). Options: 'Passenger_Cars_Only', 'Mixed_Heavy_Traffic', 'Public_Transit_Focus', 'No_Vehicles'.

features.description: The relative position of the camera/vehicle within the current lane.
features.extraction_query: Identify the 'Ego_Vehicle_Lane_Position' relative to the lane markings. Options: 'Centered', 'Left_Biased', 'Right_Biased', 'Lane_Changing'.
